definitions.label: All registered manufacturing
definitions.limitation: ASI covers registered factories and selected related establishments, not informal manufacturing.

definitions.label: Food processing and beverages
definitions.limitation: Includes beverage manufacturing; agricultural production and informal processors are outside ASI.

definitions.label: Textiles and apparel
definitions.limitation: Technical textiles cannot be consistently separated across every year.

definitions.label: Leather and footwear
definitions.limitation: Covers registered manufacturing, not retail or home-based production.

definitions.label: Computer, electronic and optical products
definitions.limitation: Semiconductor fabrication and design cannot be cleanly separated from other electronic components in ASI.

definitions.label: Electronics and electrical equipment
definitions.limitation: Broader robustness definition; results should be shown alongside the core electronics definition.

definitions.label: Motor vehicles, bodies and components
definitions.limitation: ASI does not identify electric powertrains separately from conventional vehicles.

definitions.label: Motor vehicles, components and tyres
definitions.limitation: Includes tyres as a robustness definition but not all upstream automotive suppliers.

definitions.label: Pharmaceuticals and medical devices
definitions.limitation: Biotechnology services and standalone R&D centres outside registered factories are not covered.

definitions.label: Aerospace and selected defence manufacturing
definitions.limitation: Many dual-use suppliers sit in broader engineering industries and cannot be identified from NIC alone.

definitions.label: Ships and boats
definitions.limitation: Does not include every marine supplier or port service.

definitions.label: Games and toys
definitions.limitation: Small cells require three-year pooling and disclosure suppression.

definitions.label: Materials recovery
definitions.limitation: Captures recovery establishments covered by ASI, not circular practices within other factories.
